name: Naturepedia™ Index
description: Top-level machine-readable discovery index for Naturepedia™, organizing major knowledge systems, semantic families, AI discovery pathways, and recursive retrieval architecture.

systemFamilies.name: Geometry Systems
systemFamilies.description: Mathematical organization, natural geometry, recursive patterns, and living mathematics.

systemFamilies.name: Earth Systems
systemFamilies.description: Planetary systems, atmospheric processes, weather, geology, climate, water, soils, and ecosystem relationships.

systems.name: Weather™
systems.role: Atmospheric processes, water cycling, circulation, jet streams, clouds, storms, and weather-pattern relationships

systems.name: Water Systems™
systems.role: Hydrology, rivers, wetlands, groundwater, estuaries, and watershed systems

semanticRelationships: Weather Patterns Across Scale™ → Seasonal Ecology™

systemFamilies.name: Carbon Systems
systemFamilies.description: Carbon cycling, forest carbon, soil carbon, microbial carbon, and climate feedbacks.

systemFamilies.name: Plant Intelligence Systems
systemFamilies.description: Plant communication, electrophysiology, mycorrhizal networks, and bioelectric ecology.

systemFamilies.name: Information Systems in Nature
systemFamilies.description: Biological communication, distributed intelligence, ecological computation, and living information.

systemFamilies.name: Tree Systems
systemFamilies.description: North American tree families, forest ecology, and ecological relationships.

systemFamilies.name: Wildlife Systems
systemFamilies.description: Species, habitats, tracking, migration, conservation, and biodiversity.

systemFamilies.name: Water Systems
systemFamilies.description: Hydrology, wetlands, rivers, estuaries, groundwater, and watersheds.

systemFamilies.name: Volcanic & Geothermal Systems
systemFamilies.description: Volcanic landscapes, geothermal ecosystems, Yellowstone thermal features, and hydrothermal environments.

systemFamilies.name: Framework & Governance
systemFamilies.description: Robbie's Razor™, Grand Compression, Plate™ Architecture, Graph Registries™, ACR™, and Commercial Data Licensing.
